cli.welcome: Welcome to Ember - AI Agent Framework

commands.chat: Start an interactive chat session with an AI model
commands.serve: Start the web server with API and UI

errors.api_key_missing: API key for %{provider} is missing. Set it via environment variable or configuration file.
errors.network: Network error occurred. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.rate_limit: Rate limit exceeded. Please wait %{seconds} seconds before retrying.
errors.model_not_found: Model '%{model}' not found. Use 'ember config models' to see available models.
errors.invalid_config: Invalid configuration for '%{field}'. Please check your settings.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. The server may be overloaded. Please try again later.
errors.authentication: Authentication failed. Please verify your API key.
errors.server: Server error occurred. Please try again later.

descriptions.browser: Control a headless browser for web automation
